text.tspan: BLOOM FILTER: 'is X probably in this set?'
u2192 NO FALSE NEGATIVES, but small chance of FALSE POSITIVE

g.text: STRUCTURE: a bit array of m bits + k hash functions

text.tspan: YES u2192 'possibly in set' (could be false positive)
where n = items inserted, m = bits, k = hashes
Example: n=1M items, m=10M bits, k=7 u2192 fpr u2248 0.8%
Compare: storing 1M strings of 30 chars each = 30 MB exact set.
Bloom filter: 1.25 MB at 0.8% false positive rate u2192 24u00d7 smaller.
